visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with short black hair wearing a navy blue beret and an off-the-shoulder navy blue dress stands against a plain gray wall, speaking with animated facial expressions and hand gestures. (2) A second woman with long dark hair in a pink cardigan joins her; they both smile broadly at the camera while colorful text overlays and stylized graphics appear around them. (3) A close-up shot transitions to show a black iron pan with meat, tofu, and mushrooms being cooked with tongs in a restaurant environment. (4) A fast-paced montage sequence shows the two women in various locations (outdoors, restaurant, kitchen) eating, drinking, and holding colorful branded supplement packets. (5) The two women stand together again in the original studio-like setting, showing a variety of colorful supplement packets to the camera and gesturing toward their stomachs with smiling faces. (6) A close-up shot shows a hand holding up a pink packet in front of the two women who are blurred in the background holding a mug and small blue dumbbells. (7) In a restaurant setting, the women are shown eating large bowls of noodles while holding up supplement packets and giving a thumbs up to the camera. (8) They hold up a large branded product box and additional promotional items like a bottle of sunscreen while smiling at the camera in a final celebratory pose.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 我們最常收到的私訊跟留言就是. (2) [Variety]: 你們怎麼越來越漂亮!!. (3) [Subtitle]: 我們兩個食量都很大. [Variety]: 食量都很大. (4) [Subtitle]: 一頓晚餐的量就有這麼多. (5) [Variety]: 學習正確的飲食順序. (6) [Subtitle]: 先吃光蛋白質. (7) [Subtitle]: 再吃蔬菜最後才碰碳水. (8) [Variety]: 這些放縱的時候. (9) [Slogan]: 保健食品. [Logo]: SOS. (10) [Slogan]: cofit大餐包. (11) [Variety]: 小秘訣. (12) [Variety]: 有了苦瓜胜肽. (13) [Slogan]: 多喝水、多運動. (14) [Slogan]: 極黑生薑黃 能調整體質. (15) [Slogan]: 餐前搭配冰島甲殼素. (16) [Variety]: 只吸附壞油 保留好油特性. (17) [Variety]: 一起變得更自信更自在. (18) [Slogan]: 美食控的三大盾牌 最低58折. [Logo]: cofit. (19) [Logo]: ANESSA.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, at least 2 other female customers visible in restaurant backgrounds.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has short dark hair, wearing a navy beret and navy dress. The other has long dark hair, wearing a light pink cardigan and jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain gray interior wall, a sukiyaki restaurant with wooden tables and iron pans, a modern kitchen with appliances, and an outdoor urban setting by a waterfront.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female narration begins over a mid-tempo, rhythmic electronic BGM with a strong, driving beat; her voice is bright, sharp, and highly enunciated. (2) A quick 'whoosh' transition SFX occurs as the narration continues at a fast pace, followed by a brief layer of female laughter in the background. (3) The distinct sound of a metallic sizzle and liquid bubbling is heard momentarily over the music during the food sequence, adding a realistic texture. (4) The narrator's pitch remains high and consistent, with frequent 'ding' and 'pop' digital SFX highlighting specific verbal points or visual text transitions. (5) A clear 'crinkle' sound of plastic packaging being handled is audible as the narrator discusses the supplement packets, integrated with the vocal track. (6) The BGM maintains a stable synth texture and repetitive drum pattern while the narrator shifts to a more persuasive, promotional tone with increased intensity. (7) The recording concludes with a final energetic phrase from the narrator, accompanied by a concluding 'ding' SFX and a sharp cut-off of the track.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Method -> Product Evidence -> Offer
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional endorsement for 'Cofit' health supplements. It starts by addressing a common fan question about how the creators maintain their appearance despite eating large meals. It then transitions into explaining a specific eating order and the regular use of the advertised supplements to help with metabolism and weight management during indulgent meals.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators explicitly hold the products, name the brand 'Cofit', show the packaging, and provide discount information and CTA for viewers.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video employs a typical high-energy social media influencer style with fast cuts and colorful text to maintain high audience engagement.
